message:
Enable runtime provider hot-swap from persisted session model preference

When resuming a session whose header records a different provider/model
than the one currently configured on the AgentSession, dynamically look
up the entry in ModelRegistry and swap the provider before sending the
next request. This ensures sessions created with provider A continue
using provider A even when the default has changed.

agent.rs:
- AgentSession gains optional model_registry and auth_storage fields
  with builder and setter methods
- run_to_completion and its abort variant now extract (provider, model)
  from the session header and, when they differ from the active agent
  provider, create a replacement via providers::create_provider()
- Warn-and-continue on provider creation failure to avoid blocking the
  session entirely

main.rs:
- Wire model_registry and auth_storage into agent_session before
  entering the RPC branch

auth.rs:
- Refactor oauth_expires_at_ms to use saturating_add/saturating_sub
  with named SAFETY_MARGIN_MS constant to prevent overflow on extreme
  expires_in values (+/- i64 range)
- Add two tests exercising huge positive and negative expiry values

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
